calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Court Judgment On Default
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone # 415 551 3775 (514)

William Gutierrez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, PENNY KLOTZ.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VROLYK & COMPANY, LLC, a Delaware Litied Liability Company; ANNE K. VROLYK, individually and doing business as VROLYK & COMPANY, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations submitted and filed in support of request for Default Prove up are admitted in evicence by the court.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $101,586.58
Pre-Judgment Interest: $16,749.00
Attorney's Fees: $13,652.00
Costs: $940.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $132,927.58
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
